SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

Record Class RuleDefinition

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules.RuleDefinition
Record Components:
id - Stable rule identifier (e.g., "SYS-0000001" or "USR-0000001"), or null if not specified
ruleId - YAML key name (e.g., "sslv2_supported")
description - Human-readable description (may contain ${varName} placeholders for meta interpolation)
score - Normalized severity score (0.0-1.0) when the rule fires
enabled - Whether this rule is active
inconclusive - If true, always mark deduction as inconclusive
when - Compiled condition expression
whenInconclusive - Compiled inconclusive-path expression, or null
meta - Named variables backed by DSL expressions, interpolated into description when the rule fires
scope - Structured scope metadata (layer, protocols, aspect), or null if not specified
sourceLine - 1-based YAML source line where this rule is defined, -1 if unknown
sourceColumn - 1-based YAML source column where this rule is defined, -1 if unknown
public record RuleDefinition(String id, String ruleId, String description, double score, boolean enabled, boolean inconclusive, RuleExpression when, RuleExpression whenInconclusive, Map<String,RuleExpression> meta, RuleScope scope, int sourceLine, int sourceColumn) extends Record
A single scoring rule parsed from YAML.

    Creates an instance of a RuleDefinition record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • RuleDefinition

      public RuleDefinition(String id, String ruleId, String description, double score, boolean enabled, boolean inconclusive, RuleExpression when, RuleExpression whenInconclusive, Map<String,RuleExpression> meta, RuleScope scope, int sourceLine, int sourceColumn)
      Creates an instance of a RuleDefinition record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      ruleId - the value for the ruleId record component
      description - the value for the description record component
      score - the value for the score record component
      enabled - the value for the enabled record component
      inconclusive - the value for the inconclusive record component
      when - the value for the when record component
      whenInconclusive - the value for the whenInconclusive record component
      meta - the value for the meta record component
      scope - the value for the scope record component
      sourceLine - the value for the sourceLine record component
      sourceColumn - the value for the sourceColumn record component

  • Method Details

    • effectiveId

      public String effectiveId()
      Returns the effective rule identifier for deductions. Prefers the stable id (SYS-/USR- format) when present, falls back to the YAML key name.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
